text_template: Support for the show today comes from Quince There no better time than today to update your wardrobe and it not because your clothes aren fabulous not because you not fabulous you fabulous but look look outside summer is here or it you know been here in some cases and you want pieces that feel easy comfortable and still put together That where Quince comes in They focus on high essentials that can make you feel amazing quite frankly Well-made basics, but without the luxury markup. Claire White has tried Quince. I've gotten a lot of great summer pieces from Quince, from their basic t-shirts to their linen button-downs. They have a really wide range of awesome summer staples that will stay in my closet the whole season. Elevate your summer wardrobe. Go to quince.com slash explained for free shipping on your order and 365 day returns. Now I'll be able to win Canada too! That's Q-U-I-N-C-E.com slash explained for free shipping and 365 day returns. Quince.com slash explained.
